author: xcloud-ai
description: Quickly insert code blocks with automatic cursor positioning. Supports custom languages, selection wrapping, hotkey configuration with conflict detection. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: 旭说云原生
manifest.description: 快捷插入代码块并自动定位光标。支持自定义语言、选中文本包裹、快捷键配置与冲突检测。
manifest.name: XU Quick CodeBlock

name: Quick CodeBlock

releases.author: xcloud-ai
releases.description:
## v1.1.0 修复审核反馈

### 修复
- 插件名称统一为 XU Quick CodeBlock(解决名称不一致 Warning)
- description 添加句号结尾
- README 改为中英双语,补充安装和使用说明

releases.author: xcloud-ai
releases.description:
Quick CodeBlock v1.0.0

- Quickly insert code blocks with automatic cursor positioning inside the block
- Wrap selected text with code block in one command
- Custom language list
- Hotkey configuration with real-time conflict detection
- Drop-in replacement for Templater code block templates
releases.name: v1.0.0
